$comment: Hand-authored structure declaration. The cleaner (build-cleaned-spine.mjs) uses this to slice raw/ into the derived/ reading spine. textStartPage seeds the running page-anchor counter for de-pagination. layout: 'line-paragraphs' = one paragraph per line (clean Gutenberg); 'wrapped' = paragraphs wrap across lines (needs reflow + de-hyphenation).

chapters.title: Introduction
The Meaning of Numbers
The Problem of World-history (1): Physiognomic and Systematic
The Problem of World-history (2): The Destiny-idea and the Causality-principle
Makrokosmos (1): The Symbolism of the World-picture and the Problem of Space
Makrokosmos (2): Apollinian, Faustian, and Magian Soul
Music and Plastic (1): The Arts of Form
Music and Plastic (2): Act and Portrait
Soul-image and Life-feeling (1): On the Form of the Soul
Soul-image and Life-feeling (2): Buddhism, Stoicism, and Socialism
Faustian and Apollinian Nature-knowledge

volumes.title: Perspectives of World-History
volumes.$comment: Re-sourced 2026-06-22 from the clean, human-proofread Project Gutenberg edition (eBook #78914, Atkinson/Knopf) — superseding the Internet-Archive OCR. raw/Spengler_Decline_II_Gutenberg.txt is generated from the (gitignored) Gutenberg HTML by scripts/ingest/extract-vol-ii-gutenberg.mjs into the same line-paragraphs shape as Vol I (CHAPTER headers, one paragraph per line, [N] refs, 941 global-numbered endnotes). This eliminated the OCR review queue entirely; the old IA overlay + review-queue were retired (see ADR-0012). The original OCR file raw/Spengler_Decline_II.txt is left untouched (raw/ is read-only).

chapters.title: Origin and Landscape (A): The Cosmic and the Microcosm
Origin and Landscape (B): The Group of the Higher Cultures
Origin and Landscape (C): The Relations between the Cultures
Cities and Peoples (A): The Soul of the City
Cities and Peoples (B): Peoples, Races, Tongues
Cities and Peoples (C): Primitives, Culture-Peoples, Fellaheen
Problems of the Arabian Culture (A): Historic Pseudomorphoses
Problems of the Arabian Culture (B): The Magian Soul
Problems of the Arabian Culture (C): Pythagoras, Mohammed, Cromwell
The State (A): The Problem of the Estates — Nobility and Priesthood
The State (B): State and History
The State (C): Philosophy of Politics
The Form-world of Economic Life (A): Money
The Form-world of Economic Life (B): The Machine

works.title: Man and Technics
works.subtitle: A Contribution to a Philosophy of Life
works.author: Oswald Spengler
works.translator: JD Jones with Claude (fresh translation from the 1931 German)

volumes.title: Man and Technics
volumes.$comment: Fresh, independent English translation made for this portal from the public-domain 1931 German original (Der Mensch und die Technik, C. H. Beck, Munich; Vordenker 2009 digital edition). NOT the copyrighted Atkinson/Knopf 1932 translation. Spengler's own Decline cross-reference footnotes are preserved as [N] global endnotes. German source: raw/Mensch_und_Technik_DE.txt (generated by scripts/translate/extract-mt-german.py); term glossary: data/translation/mt-glossary.json. raw/ is never mutated.

chapters.title: Technics as the Tactics of Living
Herbivores and Beasts of Prey
The Origin of Man: Hand and Tool
The Second Stage: Speech and Enterprise
The Last Act: Rise and End of the Machine Culture
